phrases.intent_en: Ask how to skip the queue for the Duomo
phrases.text_local: Scusi, come si evita la fila per il Duomo?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KOH-meh see eh-VEE-tah lah FEE-lah per eel DWOH-moh?
phrases.cultural_note: The Florence Duomo pass covers the cathedral, baptistry, bell tower and crypt — booking online avoids the queue.

responses.english: With an online booking you go straight in.
responses.phonetic: kon lah preh-noh-tah-TSYOH-neh on-LEE-neh, see EN-trah SOO-bee-toh.
responses.french: Con la prenotazione online, si entra subito.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the baptistry entrance is

responses.english: On the north side, opposite the cathedral.
responses.phonetic: sool LAH-toh nord, dee FRON-teh al DWOH-moh.
responses.french: Sul lato nord, di fronte al Duomo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how many steps the bell tower has
phrases.text_local: Scusi, quanti gradini ha il Campanile di Giotto?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KWAN-tee grah-DEE-nee ah eel kam-pah-NEE-leh dee JOT-toh?
phrases.cultural_note: Giotto's Campanile has 414 steps and no lift — the view from the top rivals that of the dome itself.

responses.english: Four hundred and fourteen, with no lift.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to leave bags before entering
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si lasciano i bagagli prima di entrare?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see lah-SHAH-noh ee bah-GAH-lyee PREE-mah dee en-TRAH-reh?

responses.english: At the luggage storage on Via dell'Oriuolo.
responses.phonetic: al deh-POH-zee-toh bah-GAH-lyee een VEE-ah del-loh-RYOO-oh-loh.
responses.french: Al deposito bagagli in Via dell'Oriuolo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what time the cathedral closes
phrases.text_local: Scusi, a che ora chiude il Duomo?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, ah keh OH-rah KYOO-deh eel DWOH-moh?

responses.phonetic: AL-leh seh-DEE-chee eh TREN-tah nay JOR-nee feh-ree-AH-lee.
responses.french: Alle sedici e trenta nei giorni feriali.
